note: All figures are mid-market estimates. See individual sources below. 'foreignAccess' levels: open / restricted / banned / quota-lease. Mortgage rates are indicative owner-occupier resident rates.

my.midPriceNote: Median transacted price KL condos, NAPIC 2024
my.foreignNote: Min RM 1M (KL/Selangor/Penang); foreigners pay 8% flat stamp duty (Budget 2026, eff. 1 Jan 2026; was 4% flat from Budget 2024 Jan 2024–Dec 2025); MM2H Silver tier: RM600K min

sources.vacancy: NAPIC 2024 overhang data ~15% for KL condos
sources.foreignAccess: propcashflow.my foreigner stamp duty guide; Budget 2026 (announced Oct 2025, eff. 1 Jan 2026); alestriaproperty.com 2026

tw.midPriceNote: Median Taipei City apartment price, Sinyi Realty 2024
tw.foreignNote: Foreigners need MOI approval for residential land; condos generally accessible but ARC required for mortgage. No surcharge but administrative hurdles.

sources.appreciation5y: Real Estate Index System, DGBAS — Taipei +40–50% 2020–2024
sources.vacancy: Construction & Planning Agency; approx 10% structural vacancy

jp.midPriceNote: Median new condo Tokyo metro 2024 (REINS/Recruit Suumo)
jp.foreignNote: No restrictions on foreign ownership. From fiscal 2026, nationality declaration required at registration (informational only, not a prerequisite for purchase). No surcharge.

sources.midPrice: REINS/Recruit Suumo 2024 Tokyo metropolitan new condo median ~¥90M
sources.vacancy: Ministry of Land, Infrastructure survey 2023; Tokyo ~8%
sources.foreignAccess: Japan Times Dec 2025; taxesforexpats.com Japan guide 2025

au.midPriceNote: CoreLogic Sydney median house price Q1 2026 ~A$1.55M
au.foreignNote: From 1 Apr 2025 to 31 Mar 2027: ban on purchasing established (existing) dwellings. New builds still permitted with FIRB approval. NSW surcharge 9% (from 1 Jan 2025; was 8%); VIC/QLD 8%. FIRB fees (new dwellings): A$15,100 (≤A$1M), A$30,300 (A$1M-2M), A$90,900 (A$2M-4M) per 2025-26 schedule.

sources.yield: CoreLogic Q1 2026 national gross yield 4.69%; Sydney lower ~2.7–2.9%
sources.mortgageRate: RBA cash rate 4.10%; typical owner-occupier variable ~6.3% (2025)
sources.foreignAccess: Revenue NSW surcharge-purchaser-duty (9% from Jan 2025); foreigninvestment.gov.au 2025-26 fee schedule; KLGates Feb 2025; HSF Kramer 2025

nz.midPriceNote: REINZ Auckland median house price Dec 2025
nz.foreignNote: General foreign buyer ban remains. Exception from Dec 2025: AI+/Investor 1&2 visa holders may buy property valued NZ$5M+ (Royal Assent 19 Dec 2025). Mainstream foreign buyers still banned.

sources.appreciation5y: REINZ HPI 2020–2025; peaked 2021 then corrected; net ~+10%
sources.foreignAccess: Lane Neave immigration lawyers Dec 2025; IMI Daily Dec 2025; RNZ

uk.midPriceNote: ONS UK House Price Index London average Dec 2025
uk.foreignNote: Non-UK residents pay +2% SDLT surcharge (from Apr 2021). Additional dwelling surcharge now +5% (from Oct 31 2024; was +3%). Combined non-resident + additional = +7%. SDLT nil-rate threshold reverted to £125K from Apr 2025. No ownership ban.

sources.yield: Global Property Guide UK Q4 2025 ~6.98% national; London lower ~3–5%; used 4.5% for London mix
sources.priceIncomeRatio: UK valuation.html ~8.6x London (disposable income); used ~9x gross
sources.foreignAccess: gov.uk SDLT non-resident surcharge guidance; gov.uk/guidance/stamp-duty-land-tax-buying-an-additional-residential-property (5% Oct 2024); Birketts

us.foreignNote: No federal restriction on foreign buyers. NYC/NY state: NYC transfer tax, mansion tax on $1M+, FIRPTA withholding on foreign sellers. NYC co-ops often reject foreign buyers via board approval.

sources.yield: Global Property Guide US 2025 national avg ~6.56%; NYC lower ~4.5–6%; used 5.5%
sources.foreignAccess: No federal restriction; co-op board rules are practical barrier

th.foreignNote: Condos: freehold permitted up to 49% of building floor area (Condominium Act). Foreigners cannot own land freehold; land only via leasehold (max 30yr extendable). Foreign mortgage access very limited.

sources.mortgageRate: BOT policy rate 2.75%; foreign buyers rarely qualify — typical developer financing ~7%
sources.vacancy: REIC 2024 Bangkok condo oversupply; estimated vacancy ~18%

vn.foreignNote: Foreigners: 50-yr renewable lease only (no freehold land). Condo quota: max 30% of units per project. Housing Law 2023 + Land Law 2024 in force. Overseas Vietnamese (Viet Kieu with VN passport) treated as locals.

sources.midPrice: CBRE Vietnam Q4 2024 HCMC mid-grade condo ~₫5.5B
sources.vacancy: Savills Vietnam Q4 2024 HCMC condo ~12% vacancy
sources.foreignAccess: Housing Law 2023; Land Law 2024; rumavi.com 2026 guide

kr.foreignNote: From Aug 21 2025: permit required before purchasing in Seoul + most of Gyeonggi + 7 Incheon districts. Must occupy within 4 months and reside 2+ years. Penalty: up to 10% of property value. Areas outside restricted zone (Busan, Jeju) use older 60-day reporting only.

sources.midPrice: KB Real Estate 2024 Seoul apartment median ~₩1B
sources.mortgageRate: BOK base rate 3.0%; typical home loan ~4.5–5.0% (2025)
sources.foreignAccess: Bloomberg Aug 2025; KED Global Aug 2025; Korea Times Jul 2025

ca.foreignNote: Foreign Buyer Ban extended to Jan 1 2027 (announced Feb 2024). If eligible (work permit/PR): ON +25% NRST province-wide; Toronto city adds +10% MNRST (total 35% in Toronto city, effective Jan 1 2025). BC +20% NRST. Government considering post-2027 easing.

sources.populationGrowth: Statistics Canada 2024 net migration (highest in G7)
sources.foreignAccess: Canada.ca Finance Dept Feb 2024; CMHC; Bloomberg Dec 2025

ie.foreignNote: No nationality restrictions on property purchase. Foreigners own freehold same as Irish citizens. No foreign surcharge. Stamp duty: 1% ≤€1M, 2% €1M–€1.5M, 6% >€1.5M (Budget 2025, from Oct 2024). Non-residents face stricter mortgage requirements (30-40% deposit). Golden visa closed Feb 2024.

sources.midPrice: CSO Residential Property Price Index / Daft.ie Dublin median ~€450K (2025)
sources.yield: Global Property Guide Ireland Q4 2025 ~7.71% national; Dublin closer to 6–7%
sources.vacancy: Daft.ie Rental Report 2025; Dublin vacancy extremely tight ~1.5%
sources.priceIncomeRatio: Global Property Guide Ireland; Demographia 2025 ~9x Dublin
